name: JTEC Corporation
summary: JTEC Corporation designs, manufactures, and sells X-ray mirrors for synchrotron facilities in Japan. Its X-ray mirrors are used for study in the pharmaceutical, electronic, material, food, beauty, and other fields. The company also designs, develops, manufactures, and sells automated cell culture systems, as well as automated systems in various fields. JTEC Corporation was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Ibaraki, Japan.
